Name: Bad Call
Description: Discard a card. Reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Burned
Description: Add +4 to your next batter’s swing.

Name: Check Swing
WhenPlayed: Play on a SO result on the batter’s chart.
Description: Discard 2 cards. Change the result to a BB. If your batter has the V icon you may play Check Swing on a SO result on the pitcher’s chart.

Name: Deep in the Gap
Description: Discard a card. Roll a die. If your roll ties or beats the center fielder’s Speed change the result to a 2B.

Name: Drained
Description: If the pitcher is tired and there’s a runner on first with Speed A or Speed B he steals second without a throw. (You can steal a base only if it’s open.)

Name: Ducks on the Pond
Description: Discard a card. Add +1 to the swing for each runner.

Name: Great Addition
Description: Discard a card. Add +1 to any roll. If your player has the RY icon instead add +2 to any roll. (You can use Great Addition to change a roll that has been made already.)

Name: Hard Slide
Description: Discard a card. The defense rerolls the double-play attempt.

Name: Inside the Park Home Run
Description: If your batter is Speed A the defense makes an outfield Fielding check at +8. If it succeeds your batter is out and each runner scores. If it fails your batter and each runner scores. If your batter has the SB icon instead make the check at +3.

Name: Options
Description: Choose one: Add +1 to the swing subtract 1 from the pitch or draw a card and then discard a card.

Name: Out of the Frying Pan
Description: Discard any number of cards. Look at your opponent’s hand and choose that many cards. Your opponent discards the chosen cards.

Name: Play the Percentages
Description: If the pitcher is LHP and your batter bats R or S add +2 to the swing.

Name: Pointers
WhenPlayed: Play before your batter’s swing is rerolled.
Description: Add +3 to the reroll.

Name: Poor Positioning
Description: Add +1 to the swing. If the defense has any players with the R icon on defense instead add +3 to the swing.

Name: Pull the Ball
Description: If the pitcher is RHP and your batter bats L or S reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Rough Outing
Description: If at least 4 runs have been charged to your opponent’s pitcher he gets –1 IP.

Name: Slow Roller
Description: Subtract 3 from the defense’s roll.

Name: Stick a Fork in Him
Description: If the pitcher is tired reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Sweet Swing
Description: If the pitcher is RHP and your batter bats L or S add +2 to the swing.

Name: Take What’s Given
Description: Add +2 to the swing. If your batter gets a HR result change the result to a 1B.

Name: Think Again
Description: If your opponent just played a card that made you discard Think Again return Think Again to your hand and draw a card.

Name: Turn on It
Description: If the pitcher is LHP and your batter bats R or S reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Aces Up
WhenPlayed: Play on a 1B result on the pitcher’s chart.
Description: Reroll the pitch and the swing. If your pitcher has the CY icon you may instead reroll the pitch and swing for any result (on the pitcher’s chart).

Name: Caught Him Leaning
Description: If there is a runner on first with Speed A and second base is open roll a die. 1-17: No effect. 18-20: The runner on first is out.

Name: Caught the Corner
Description: Subtract 1 from the batter’s swing. If the batter gets a SO result draw a card. If your pitcher has the K icon and the batter gets a SO result your opponent also chooses a card from his or her hand and discards it. 1 2 [Next] [End]

Name: Choke
WhenPlayed: Play after the third out of an inning.
Description: If the bases were loaded your opponent chooses and discards 3 cards from his or her hand. (If your opponent has only 1 or 2 cards discard all of them.)

Name: Cover Second
Description: Choose either your second baseman or shortstop. Add that player’s Fielding to the defense’s total roll. If the chosen player has the G icon and the stolen-base attempt fails your opponent discards 2 cards.

Name: Dominating
Description: If your pitcher is a closer and the batter gets an out result change the result to a SO.

Name: Foul Ball
Description: Discard a card. Reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.) If your pitcher has the 20 icon your opponent also chooses a card from his or her hand and discards it.

Name: Good Leather
Description: Add +2 to a player’s Fielding for any roll. If that player has the G icon instead add +6 to his Fielding for any roll.

Name: Hooking Foul
WhenPlayed: Play on a 1B or 2B result on the pitcher’s chart.
Description: If your pitcher is LHP and the batter bats L reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: In the Zone
WhenPlayed: Play after the third out of an inning.
Description: If your pitcher got 3 SO results this inning add +2 to each of his pitches next inning.

Name: Infield In
Description: If first base is open and the batter gets a GB result runners on second and third don’t advance.

Name: Lined Out of Play
WhenPlayed: Play on a 1B or 2B result on the pitcher’s chart.
Description: If your pitcher is RHP and the batter bats R reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Locate
Description: Leave this card on your pitcher until the end of the inning. If your pitcher gets a natural 20 on a pitch roll you may discard Locate to draw 4 cards.

Name: Locked In
Description: Your opponent chooses one: Subtract 2 from the swing; or you draw 2 cards.

Name: Nerves of Steel
Description: If your pitcher is a closer add +3 to the pitch.

Name: Paint the Corner
Description: Discard a card. Subtract 2 from the swing. If your pitcher has the 20 icon draw a card.

Name: Power Pitching
Description: Subtract 3 from the swing. If the batter gets a FB result change the result to a HR. If your pitcher has the CY icon and the batter gets an out result draw 2 cards.

Name: Short Fly
Description: Change the result to a PU.

Name: Sloppy Bunt
Description: If the batter is a pitcher the lead runner is out. The batter and each other runner is safe.

Name: Split-Finger Fastball
WhenPlayed: Play before the batter’s swing is rerolled.
Description: Subtract 3 from the reroll.

Name: Top-Level Strategy
Description: If the batter is a pinch hitter and gets an out result your opponent reveals his or her hand. You choose 3 cards from his or her hand and discard them. (If your opponent has only 1 or 2 cards discard all of them.)

Name: Tough as Nails
Description: If there is a runner in scoring position with less than 2 outs subtract 2 from the swing. If your pitcher has the RP icon draw a card.

Name: Change in Strategy
Description: Draw 3 cards and then discard 3 cards.

Name: Close Call
Description: Discard a card. If the roll isn’t for a pitch or a swing add +2 to it or subtract 2 from it.

Name: New Strategies
Description: Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Your opponent chooses 2 of those cards. Put the chosen cards into your hand and the remaining card on the bottom of your deck.

Name: Second Look
Description: Reroll the attempt.

Name: Swing at Anything
Description: Reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Think Twice
WhenPlayed: Play on a reroll of a pitch or a swing.
Description: Draw 2 cards. [Begin] [Previous] 1 2

Name: Down the Middle
Description: If the pitcher is tired change the result to a HR.

Name: Grooved
Description: Discard a card. If the bases are empty add +3 to the swing or subtract 2 from the pitch.

Name: Lost in the Sun
Description: Discard a card. The defense makes a combined infield and outfield Fielding check. If it fails change the result to a 1B that doesn’t let runners try for extra bases.

Name: Protect the Runner
Description: Make a stolen-base attempt using a runner on first or second. Subtract 3 from the catcher’s roll. Add +2 to the pitch. (You can steal a base only if it’s open.)

Name: Running on Fumes
Description: If the pitcher is tired reroll the swing on your batter’s chart. (If he’s a pitcher use his chart anyway.)

Name: Serious Wheels
Description: Make a stolen-base attempt using a runner on first or second and add +5 to the runner’s speed. If your player has the {SB} icon steal without a throw. (You can steal a base only if it’s open.)

Name: Smash up the Middle
Description: Discard a card. The second baseman and shortstop make a Fielding check. If it fails change the result to a 1B.

Name: Superior Talent
Description: Leave this card on your batter until the end of the game. If your batter gets a natural 20 on a swing roll you may discard Superior Talent to draw 4 cards.

Name: Swat!
Description: If your batter gets the advantage add +3 to the swing. If your batter gets the advantage and has the {S} icon draw a card. If your batter gets any out result change the result to a SO.

Name: Timing
WhenPlayed: Play on a FB or GB result.
Description: If a reliever or closer is on the mound roll a die. 1–5: Change the result to a SO. 6–16: Reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.) 17–18: Change the result to a 1B. 19–20: Change the result to a 2B.

Name: Calculated Risk
Description: The batter is intentionally walked. (This isn’t a BB result.) Return each offensive strategy card played this at-bat to its owner’s hand.

Name: Chin Music
Description: Discard a card. Leave this card on the batter who just walked. (It remains in play.) Subtract 1 from each of that batter’s swings.

Name: Great Start
WhenPlayed: Play after the third out of an inning.
Description: If your starter would be tired next inning and he’s given up 3 or fewer runs he gets +1 IP. (Playing another Great Start this inning won’t do anything.)

Name: High and Tight
Description: If your opponent’s last batter this inning got a hit result add +2 to the pitch or subtract 1 from the swing.

Name: Intimidation
Description: If the last batter struck out add +2 to the pitch.

Name: On Your Toes
Description: Add +10 to your attempt. If you fail discard a card.

Name: Rally Killer
WhenPlayed: Play after a successful double-play attempt.
Description: Your opponent discards 2 cards (1 if he or she has only 1).

Name: Setup Man
Description: Play Setup Man only on a reliever. Subtract 2 from the swing. If your pitcher has the {RP} icon no more strategy cards may be played until the next at-bat.

Name: Whiff!
WhenPlayed: Play on a PU or SO result.
Description: Look at the top 3 cards of your opponent’s strategy deck. Discard one of those cards and put the other 2 back on top of the deck in any order. (You don’t have to show your opponent the cards you put back.)

Name: Dugout General
Description: If it’s the 9th inning or later choose a card in your discard pile and return it to your hand.

Name: Old Tricks
Description: Choose 1 card in your discard pile and put it on the bottom of your strategy deck. Draw a card.

Name: Out of Sync
Description: Play Out of Sync after your opponent rolls a natural 1. Look at his or her hand and choose 2 cards. Your opponent discards those cards. (If your opponent has only 1 card discard it.)

Name: Revelation
Description: If you’re losing look at your opponent’s hand. Choose a card there and set it aside. You may play that set aside card as though it were in your hand. At the start of the next inning if you didn’t play that card put it into its owner’s discard pile.

Name: Stealing Signals
Description: Look at your opponent’s hand. You may discard a card from your hand and draw a card.

Name: Superstar
Description: Play Superstar only on a player with a point value of 500 or more. Discard a card. Add +2 to any roll. (You can use Superstar to change a roll that has been made already.) 1

Name: Dialed-In
Description: Discard 2 cards. If there’s a runner in scoring position skip the pitch and roll for the swing on the batter’s chart. If the batter has the {S} icon draw a card.

Name: En Fuego!
Description: Leave this card on your batter. Add +1 to your batter’s On-Base. (Playing another En Fuego! on this player will have no effect.)

Name: Last Chance
Description: If there are 2 outs add +2 to the swing.

Name: On the Move
Description: Play On the Move only if there’s a runner on first if there are runners on first and second or if the bases are loaded. The defense can’t make a double-play attempt. If you score any runs draw a card.

Name: Opposite-Field Power
WhenPlayed: Play on a 2B result on the batter’s chart.
Description: Discard a card. If the pitcher is LHP and your batter bats R or S change the result to a HR. If your batter has the {S} icon you may play Opposite-Field Power on a 2B result on the pitcher’s chart instead.

Name: Out of Gas
Description: If the pitcher is tired add +3 to the swing.

Name: Quick Thinking
Description: Choose one: Remove a defensive (blue) card attached to a player; or you may have your opponent choose and discard a card.

Name: Swing for the Fences
Description: Add +2 to the swing. If your batter rolls a BB change the result to a SO.

Name: Wheelhouse
WhenPlayed: Play on a 2B result on the batter’s chart.
Description: Discard a card. If the pitcher is RHP and your batter bats L or S change the result to a HR. If your batter has the {S} icon you may play Wheelhouse on a 2B result on the pitcher’s chart instead.

Name: Beaned
Description: You can’t play Beaned if another strategy card has been played or used this at-bat. The batter is intentionally walked (BB). Subtract 2 from the swing of the next batter.

Name: Broken Bat
Description: Roll a die. 1–5: Skip the pitch and the swing. The result is a GB on the pitcher’s chart. If a double-play attempt is made this at-bat add +5 to the roll. 6–20: No effect (foul ball). Roll for the pitch and the swing normally.

Name: Caught Napping
WhenPlayed: Play on a hit or a FB result.
Description: Runners with Speed C can’t try for extra bases this at-bat.

Name: Chopper
Description: The lead runner is out. Each other runner is safe. You can’t make a double-play attempt.

Name: Dying Quail
WhenPlayed: Play on a 1B or a 1B+ result.
Description: Your opponent can’t make any extra-base attempts this at-bat.

Name: Great Reactions
Description: Choose one: Remove an offensive (red) card attached to a player; or you may have your opponent choose and discard a card.

Name: Insult to Injury
Description: Look at your opponent’s hand. Choose 1 of those cards and discard it.

Name: Lefty Shift
Description: If the batter bats L add +1 to the Fielding of each player on defense this at-bat.

Name: Pumped Up
WhenPlayed: Play after the third out of an inning.
Description: Draw a card for every batter your pitchers struck out this inning.

Name: Punched Out
Description: Leave Punched Out on the batter who just struck out. (It remains in play.) Before a pitch to the batter that has this card on it you may discard Punched Out to subtract 2 from the swing.

Name: Robbed!
Description: Discard a card. Subtract 1 from any roll. If your opponent has any player with the RY icon in the game, instead subtract 2 from any roll. (You can use Robbed! to change a roll that has been made already.)

Name: Feast or Famine
Description: Discard a card. Reveal the top 4 cards of your strategy deck. Your opponent splits those cards into 2 face-up piles. Put 1 pile in your hand and put the other pile into your discard pile

Name: Home-Field Advantage
Description: If you’re the home team add +2 to the pitch or the swing.

Name: Just Over the Rail
Description: Reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Late Call
Description: Discard a card. If the roll isn’t for a pitch or a swing reroll it.

Name: Outmanaged
Description: Your opponent chooses 3 cards in his or her hand and shows them to you. Choose 1 of those cards and discard it. If your opponent has any players with the {R} icon on his or her roster instead choose 2 of those cards and discard them. 1

Name: Goodbye Baseball!
WhenPlayed: Play on a walk or hit result.
Description: Play Goodbye Baseball! on a batter who has a HR result of 18+ or lower or has the {HR} icon. Reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.) If your batter has the {HR} icon add +3 to the swing.

Name: Great Addition
Description: Discard a card. Add +1 to any roll. If your player has the {RY} icon instead add +2 to any roll. (You can use Great Addition to change a roll that has been made already.)

Name: Hacker
Description: Add +3 to the swing. Change each BB and 1B result to a SO.

Name: Helping Himself
Description: Play Helping Himself on a pitcher who just got a hit on offense. Leave this card on your pitcher until the end of the game. Add +1 to each of his pitches and +3 to each of his swings. (Playing another Helping Himself on this player will have no effect.)

Name: High Pitch Count
WhenPlayed: Play after a hit or walk result.
Description: If the bases are loaded the pitcher gets –1 IP.

Name: Hit the Foul Pole
Description: Discard 1 card. Roll a die. 1–17: No effect. 18–20: Change the result to a HR.

Name: Make Contact
Description: Discard a card. If there is a runner in scoring position change any BB result to a 1B result.

Name: Pull the Ball
Description: If the pitcher is RHP and your batter bats L or S reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Rattled
WhenPlayed: Play after the third out of an inning.
Description: If your team scored 2 or more runs off the pitcher this inning he gets –1 IP.

Name: Role Player
Description: Play Role Player on a player who didn’t start the game. Leave this card on your player until the end of the game. Add +1 to each of his swings. (Playing another Role Player on this player will have no effect.)

Name: Scuffling
Description: Play Scuffling on a pitcher who is tired. Leave this card on that pitcher until the end of the game. Subtract 3 from each of his pitches.

Name: See It Clearly
Description: Subtract 1 from the pitcher’s roll. If your batter has the {S} icon instead subtract 3 from the pitcher’s roll.

Name: Serious Wheels
Description: Make a stolen-base attempt using a runner on first or second and add +5 to the runner’s Speed. If your player has the {SB} icon steal without a throw. (You can steal a base only if it’s open.)

Name: Sprint to Second
Description: Use the Speed of your runner on first for the attempt. If the attempt fails your batter and runner are both safe. (If it succeeds they’re both out.)

Name: Steal the Sign
Description: Play Steal the Sign on a runner on second base. Leave this card on your player until the end of the game. Add +2 to each of his swings. (Playing another Steal the Sign on this player will have no effect.)

Name: Turn on It
Description: If the pitcher is LHP and your batter bats R or S reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Upper-Deck Shot
Description: Discard a card. Search your deck for any card reveal it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Then shuffle your deck. If the player who hit the HR has the {HR} icon your opponent chooses and discards 2 cards.

Name: Valuable Asset
Description: Discard a card. Add +2 to the swing. If your batter has the {V} icon draw a card.

Name: Weakest Link
Description: Play Weakest Link only if your opponent has a player with the {R} icon in his or her lineup. Reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Work the Count
Description: Change the result to a BB.

WhenPlayed: Play after a successful double-play attempt.
Description: Play 6–4–3 on one of your infielders. Leave this card on that player until the end of the game. That infielder’s Fielding is now +3. (Playing another 6–4–3 on this player will have no effect.)

Name: Aces Up
WhenPlayed: Play on a 1B result on the pitcher’s chart.
Description: Reroll the pitch and the swing. If your pitcher has the {CY} icon you may instead reroll the pitch and swing for any result on the pitcher’s chart.

Name: Can of Corn
Description: Your opponent can’t make any extra-base attempts this at-bat. If one of your outfielders has the {G} icon draw a card.

Name: De-nied!
WhenPlayed: Play after a successful double-play attempt.
Description: Draw 2 cards. If any of your infielders have the {G} icon instead draw 3 cards.

Name: Fireballer
WhenPlayed: Play after the third out of an inning.
Description: If your pitcher got 3 SO results this inning draw 2 cards and your opponent chooses and discards 2 cards from his or her hand. 1 2 [Next] [End]

Name: Full Windup
Description: If the bases are empty add +2 to the pitch.

Name: Good Leather
Description: Add +2 to a player’s Fielding for any roll. If that player has the {G} icon instead add +6 to his Fielding for any roll.

Name: Hooking Foul
WhenPlayed: Play on a 1B or 2B result on the pitcher’s chart.
Description: If your pitcher is LHP and the batter bats L reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Knuckleball
Description: Roll a die. 1–2: Each runner advances one base and you roll again on this card. 3–5: Skip the pitch and swing; the result is a BB. 6–12: No effect. 13–20: Subtract 4 from the swing.

Name: Lined Out of Play
WhenPlayed: Play on a 1B or 2B result on the pitcher’s chart.
Description: If your pitcher is RHP and the batter bats R reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Masterpiece
Description: Discard 2 cards. If the bases are empty skip the pitch and roll for the swing on the pitcher’s chart. If your pitcher has the {20} icon draw 2 cards and discard 1 card from your hand.

Name: Out Pitch
Description: Leave Out Pitch on your pitcher until the end of the game. Change one type of out result on his chart (PU SO GB or FB) to another type of out result. (For example all FB’s become GB’s or all GB’s become SO’s.) (Once a type of out result is chosen it can’t be changed.)

Name: Paint the Corner
Description: Discard a card. Subtract 2 from the swing. If your pitcher has the {20} icon draw a card.

Name: Playing Shallow
Description: If the batter has a chart with a HR result of 21+ or more (or is a pitcher) reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.) If you have 2 or more outfielders with the {G} icon draw a card.

Name: Robbed!
Description: Discard a card. Subtract 1 from any roll. If your opponent has any player with the {RY} icon on his or her roster instead subtract 2 from any roll. (You can use Robbed! to change a roll that has been made already.)

Name: Shut the Door
Description: Play Shut the Door on a closer only if it's the ninth inning or later and the bases are empty. Leave this card on your pitcher until he gives up a hit or a walk. Add +2 to each of his pitches. If your pitcher has the {RP} icon draw a card. (Playing another Shut the Door on this player will have no effect.)

Name: Up and In
Description: Discard a card. No more offensive strategy cards may be played until the next at-bat.

Name: Working the Edge
Description: Leave this card on your pitcher until he gives up a hit. Add +1 to each of his pitches. If your pitcher has the {CY} icon your opponent randomly chooses and discards 1 card from his or her hand. (Playing another Working the Edge on this player will have no effect.)

Name: 25th Man
Description: Play 25th Man on your opponent's player with a point value of 50 or less. Discard a card. Subtract 2 from that roll. (You can use 25th Man to subtract from a roll that has already been made.)

Name: Change in Strategy
Description: Draw 3 cards and then discard 3 cards.

Name: Close Call
Description: Discard a card. If the roll isn’t for a pitch or a swing add +2 to it or subtract 2 from it.

Name: Fake to Third
Description: Play Fake to Third only if there are runners on first base and third base. Roll a die. 1–3: The pitcher balks and each runner advances one base. 4–16: No effect. 17–20: The runner at first is out.

Name: Fan Interference
WhenPlayed: Play on a FB or 3B result.
Description: If you’re on defense change the result to a 2B that doesn’t let runners try for extra bases. If you’re on offense reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.)

Name: Field General
Description: Play Field General only if you are losing and have less cards than your opponent. Draw cards until you have the same number of cards as your opponent.

Name: Intensity
Description: Play Intensity only if the bases are loaded. Subtract 2 from the pitch or the swing.

Name: Mind Games
WhenPlayed: Play after your opponent makes a substitution.
Description: Return a card in your discard pile to your hand.

Name: New Strategies
Description: Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Your opponent chooses 2 of those cards. Put the chosen cards into your hand and the remaining card on the bottom of your deck.

Name: Scouting Report
Description: You and your opponent each count the number of cards in your hands shuffle them into your decks and then draw that many cards. (Don’t count Scouting Report as a card in hand for the new draw.)

Name: Second Look
Description: Reroll the attempt.

Name: Swing at Anything
Description: Reroll the swing. (Use the same chart as before.) [Begin] [Previous] 1 2

Name: Free Steal
Description: If your batter has Speed A and second is open he steals it without a throw.

Name: Get Under It
Description: If your batter rolls a PU or a GB change the result to a FB.

Name: Go Yard!
Description: Look at your opponent’s hand and choose 2 cards. He or she discards those cards. If the player who hit the HR has the {V} icon your opponent discards his or her hand instead.

Name: Just Called Up
Description: Play Just Called Up only on a player with the {R} icon. Add +3 to the swing.

Name: Leadoff Man
Description: If your batter has Speed A and hits first or second in your batting order subtract 2 from the pitch or add +3 to the swing. If that batter has the {SB} icon and gets a BB or 1B result you may make a stolen-base attempt using that player. (You can steal a base only if it’s open.)

Name: Lofted
Description: Roll a die. 1-10: No effect. 11-20: Change the result to a HR.

Name: Missed the Cutoff
Description: If the defense tried to throw a runner out at home runners on first and second advance 1 base.

Name: Momentum Swing
Description: Play Momentum Swing only if you’re losing by 2 or more runs. Leave this card on your opponent’s pitcher until the end of the inning. Subtract 1 from each pitch.

Name: Shaken
Description: Play Shaken only if your last 2 (or more) batters got hit results this inning. Add +3 to the swing. (A walk isn't a hit.)

Name: Shelled
Description: Play Shelled only on a pitcher who’s given up a hit or BB to your last 4 (or more) batters this inning. Leave this card on that pitcher until the end of the game. Add +2 to each of your batter's swings. (Playing another Shelled on that pitcher will have no effect.)

Name: Texas Leaguer
Description: Discard a card. The defense makes an outfield Fielding check at +5. If the check fails change the result to a 1B that doesn’t let runners try for extra bases. If your batter has the {S} icon draw a card.

Name: Caught Looking
Description: Draw 2 cards. If your pitcher has the {K} icon you may put a card from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.

Name: Great Range
Description: Play Great Range only if there is a runner on first. Roll a die: 1-4: Each runner advances 1 base. Draw a card. 5-16: No effect. 17-20: The runner on first is out and your opponent draws a card.

Name: High Heat
Description: Discard a card. Change the result to a SO.

Name: Just Over the Wall
Description: If the total swing was 20 or more make an outfield Fielding check. If it succeeds change the result to a FB that advances each runner 1 base.

Name: Slider
Description: Subtract 1 from the pitch. If the batter gets a PU SO or FB result change the result to a GB.

Name: Stranded
WhenPlayed: Play after the third out of an inning.
Description: Draw a card for each runner left on base.

Name: Superior Athlete
Description: Leave this card on your pitcher until the end of the game. Add +2 to your infield Fielding checks. (Playing another Superior Athlete on this player will have no effect.)

Name: Taking a Risk
Description: You and your opponent flip over the top 3 cards of your decks. Whoever reveals more defense cards puts those cards in his or her hand and discards the others. The loser discards all 3 cards. If there is a tie you both discard all 3 cards and repeat the process.

Name: Team Defense
Description: If the last batter this inning got a PU GB or FB result add +2 to the pitch. If your pitcher has the {20} icon instead add +3 to the pitch.

Name: Brainstorm
Description: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Put 1 of them into your hand and discard the others.

Name: Change the Scorecard
Description: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck then choose one: Draw those 2 cards or discard those 2 cards and return Change the Scorecard to your hand.

Name: Good Coaching
Description: Remove an offense (red) defense (blue) or utility (white) card that is attached to a player.

Name: Preparation
WhenPlayed: Play after the third out of an inning.
Description: Name a card. Your opponent reveals his or her hand. If the named card is there search his or her deck and hand and put all cards with that name into the discard pile.

Name: Shell Game
Description: You and your opponent roll the die. Whoever rolls higher may choose: Draw 2 cards or your opponent discards 2 cards. 1
